intended_use: RADIFY® Triage is a radiological computer-assisted triage and notification software that analyzes adult chest X-ray images for the presence of pre-specified suspected critical findings (pleural effusi
intended_use_full: RADIFY® Triage is a radiological computer-assisted triage and notification software that analyzes adult chest X-ray images for the presence of pre-specified suspected critical findings (pleural effusion and/or pneumothorax). RADIFY® Triage uses an artificial intelligence algorithm to analyze images for features suggestive of critical findings and provides case-level output available in the PACS for worklist prioritization or triage. As a passive notification for prioritization-only software tool within the standard of care workflow, RADIFY® Triage does not send a proactive alert directly to the appropriately trained medical specialists. The product is not intended to direct attention to specific portions of an image. Its results are not intended to be used on a stand-alone basis for clinical decision-making. The device does not remove the cases from the queue and does not flag the condition as being absent.
target_condition: Pleural effusion and pneumothorax on chest X-ray
ground_truth: Three board-certified ABR (American Board of Radiology) radiologists with a minimum of 11 years of experience
other_metrics: Performance time: 3 seconds average from analysis to notification in worklist. Subgroup analyses reported consistent performance across gender (male/female), age groups (22-44, 45-64, 65-84, 85+), and image acquisition devices. Co-occurrence analysis for cases with both conditions: Pneumothorax AUC 96.36% (95% CI [95.78, 96.93]); Pleural Effusion AUC 98.20% (95% CI [97.82, 98.58]).
